name: neo-brutalist-ui
description: 新粗野主义 UI 风格 - 粗黑边框、卡片布局、平涂色彩、Memphis 影响
prompt_template: Neo-brutalist web UI design, dashboard interface, cream background {background}, pastel color panels {palette}, thick 3px black outlines, card-based layout, flat colors, bold sans-serif typography, contemporary SaaS aesthetic, --ar {aspect_ratio} --style raw --v 6
negative_prompt: gradients, soft shadows, skeuomorphic, realistic, serif fonts, delicate, ornate, vintage
